name: Nat.sub_add_cancel
statement: theorem Nat.sub_add_cancel {a b : ℕ} (h : b ≤ a) : a - b + b = a

name: Nat.pow_succ
statement: theorem Nat.pow_succ (a n : ℕ) : a ^ (n + 1) = a ^ n * a

name: Nat.two_mul
statement: theorem Nat.two_mul (n : ℕ) : 2 * n = n + n

name: Nat.succ_le_of_lt
statement: theorem Nat.succ_le_of_lt {a b : ℕ} (h : a < b) : a + 1 ≤ b

name: tsub_add_cancel_of_le
statement: theorem tsub_add_cancel_of_le {a b : ℕ} (h : b ≤ a) : a - b + b = a
